nasb.text: Behold, I will bring to it health and healing, and I will heal them; and I will reveal to them an abundance of peace and truth.

esv.text: Behold, I will bring to it health and healing, and I will heal them and reveal to them abundance of prosperity and security.

cnv.text: 看哪！我必使這城的傷口痊愈康復，我必醫治城中的居民，並且使他們享有十分的平安和穩妥。

ccb.text: 但有一天，我必使这城复兴，医治她的创伤，使她繁荣昌盛。
